title: NetherComplication
body:
# NetherComplication
NetherComplication is a custom Minecraft plugin that introduces new environmental challenges in the Nether dimension. It adds realistic dangers to specific blocks and biomes, making the Nether more immersive and challenging for players.

## Key features

### Melting Boots 
Standing on blocks like Netherrack, Crimson Nylium, or Nether Bricks will slowly damage your boots. If they break, you'll take direct damage!

### Basalt Deltas Hazards
Entering the Basalt Deltas biome without a Carved Pumpkin on your head will cause blindness and slowness due to the ash-filled air.

### Soul Sand Effect
Walking on Soul Sand or Soul Soil applies the Wither effect, making these blocks even more dangerous.

### Warped Nylium Levitation
Stepping on Warped Nylium gives you a levitation effect, adding a unique twist to exploration.
